2606.06941.title: Quantum-Inspired Trace-Augmented Evidence Selection for Reasoning over Structured Hypothesis Spaces
2606.06941.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) now solve a wide range of expert-level exams at or above human level, yet remain brittle on specialised, evidence-intensive domains such as law. On these tasks, errors arise not only from gaps in world knowledge but also from subtle distinctions between pieces of evidence and inconsistent use of supporting evidence. The most common aggregator over sampled chain-of-thought (CoT) traces, majority vote, returns the most popular answer regardless of whether its evidence is actually strongest. We propose to treat the selection of CoT reasoning fragments into a set of evidence as an explicit combinatorial optimisation problem, allowing well-supported but minority hypotheses to override noisy majorities, and to evaluate the approach on legal-reasoning benchmarks that are particularly sensitive to evidence quality. We introduce EP-HUBO (Evidence Pool Higher-Order Binary Optimisation), which generates multiple CoT traces with a small local model, parses fragments into per-hypothesis evidence pools, solves a higher-order unconstrained binary optimisation per pool with quality-derived weights (relevance, specificity, distinctiveness), and delegates a single adjudication call per question to a frontier model. We evaluate EP-HUBO on two evidence-intensive legal benchmarks using both simulated annealing on classical hardware and the Dirac-3 photonic entropy-quantum machine from Quantum Computing Inc. HUBO-style optimisation gives a principled way to aggregate reasoning fragments while preserving minority-but-correct hypotheses, and is most valuable in low-contamination domains where frontier models have not already absorbed the benchmark material.
2606.06941.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）現在能夠解決各種專家級考試，達到或超過人類水平，但在法律等專門且依賴證據的領域仍然顯得脆弱。在這些任務中，錯誤不僅源於世界知識的缺口，還來自於證據之間的微妙區別和支持證據的不一致使用。對於採樣的思考鏈（CoT）痕跡，最常見的聚合器——多數投票，會返回最受歡迎的答案，而不考慮其證據是否實際上是最強的。我們建議將CoT推理片段的選擇視為一個明確的組合優化問題，允許支持良好但屬於少數的假設覆蓋嘈雜的多數，並在特別敏感於證據質量的法律推理基準上評估該方法。我們介紹EP-HUBO（證據池高階二元優化），它使用一個小型本地模型生成多個CoT痕跡，將片段解析為每個假設的證據池，並使用質量導出的權重（相關性、特異性、區別性）對每個池進行高階無約束二元優化，並將每個問題的單一裁定呼叫委派給前沿模型。我們在兩個依賴證據的法律基準上評估EP-HUBO，使用經典硬體上的模擬退火和來自Quantum Computing Inc.的Dirac-3光子熵量子機。HUBO風格的優化提供了一種原則性的方法來聚合推理片段，同時保留少數但正確的假設，並且在前沿模型尚未吸收基準材料的低污染領域中最具價值。
2606.06941.author: Laura Wynter et.al.
2606.06941.authors: Laura Wynter, Nirvik Sahoo, Paul Griffin
